mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive forward returns for the S&P 500 over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of rate decline observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 8.5 percent, labor market slack suppresses corporate earnings growth expectations, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of periods where UNRATE exceeds 8.5 percent, or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales indicates broad-based consumer demand recovery, which compresses equity risk premiums and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in >50% of co-occurring expansion periods, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output that boosts corporate revenue forecasts, generating positive S&P 500 returns over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses to negative when CPIAUCSL month-over-month growth exceeds 0.4 percent, or 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of acceleration episodes.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in total nonfarm payrolls directly expand household income and consumption capacity, supporting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over a 5-year rolling window or payroll growth fails to predict positive returns in >50% of monthly observations.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts fall below 600 thousand units, construction sector contraction drags on related industrial demand and financial sector stability, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >65% of periods where housing starts remain below 600 thousand, or the threshold effect vanishes in out-of-sample validation.

mechanism_narrative: Low federal funds rates combined with declining unemployment indicate successful monetary transmission to the real economy, compressing equity risk premiums and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term produces negative alpha in >50% of joint observations, or multivariate model R-squared drops below 0.05 when controlling for market volatility.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in industrial production reflect severe supply-side disruptions that immediately trigger risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >55% of contraction episodes, or the signal loses predictive power when market volatility indices exceed historical 80th percentile.
